description: Contextual keywords (empty, member, of, a) are not reserved (spec/grammar.md:365), so they are legal procedure names: `define empty/member/of/a ... end` defines them in the callable namespace and the subsequent calls resolve, with no ol-reserved-word and no ol-unknown-command. This is the positive mirror of issue #113's reserved-word-define-reserved, which raises ol-reserved-word for `define repeat ... end`.
